Elements.Text: Suppose we are building a coffee shop application where customers can order different types of coffee. Each coffee can have various optional add-ons such as milk, sugar, whipped cream, etc. We want to implement a system where we can dynamically add these add-ons to a coffee order without modifying the coffee classes themselves.

graph TD     A[Concrete Component] --> B[PlainCoffee]     A --> C[getDescription()     A --> D[getCost()]          B --> BA[Coffee Decorator]     B --> BB[decoratedCoffee]          B --> BC[getDescription()     B --> BD[getCost()]          C --> CA[Milk Decorator]     C --> CB[Sugar Decorator]          C --> CC[getDescription()     C --> CD[getDescription()]          D --> DA[getCost()]
